title: Fourteen Points
summary:
Main
Image reference: Hormuz.png | assets/2026-06-22_fourteen-points_img_hormuz_e7d7a49f81b1.png
After more than three months of disruption, the prospect of the Iran conflict drawing to a close appears higher than ever. The memorandum of understanding (MOU) between Iran and the US, signed twice over the past week, sets out fourteen points charting a path towards normalisation. In brief, the MOU stipulates an end to hostilities between all parties, including Israel and Lebanon, alongside the lifting of both the US and Iranian blockades, the latter taking into account the removal of technical obstacles and mines.
